title: Campfires Respect the Recipe Book
description: Campfires will only cook recipes you know when Limited Crafting is enabled.
body:
A simple mod for a simple man. When the Limited Crafting game rule is enabled the following occurs:
- Items will only be placed on a lit campfire if the player knows a campfire recipe that uses it
- When an unlit campfire is lit, all items on it will be kicked off as item entities
